{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Head of the Imperial Guard (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Head of the [[Imperial Guard]] commands the column to move forward.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Finally, the Head of the Imperial Guard turned to address the entire column. “Forward!” she bellowed<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
